description: Updated androgynous Roman sandals have never looked this good. These sandals from catwalk are versatile enough to go with everything: from jeans to shorts to skirts. UpperOverlapping straps across the forefoot and midfootStitch detailing and metal beading on the straps with a cut out hemTextured footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured pattern on the forefoot and heel for better gripSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
